nodes.label: T3 SDK authentication pattern — handshake + authenticate + TenantClient
nodes.rationale: Every script that interacts with T3 follows the same pattern: import SDK, setEnvironment, eth_get_address, create T3nClient, handshake(), authenticate(), then create TenantClient. This is repeated across 12+ scripts, forming a shared boilerplate pattern.

nodes.label: Egress grant via tee:user/contracts agent-auth-update
nodes.rationale: T3 denies outbound HTTP by default (host/http.egress_denied). To allow it, the tenant must call t3n.execute with script_name tee:user/contracts and function agent-auth-update, listing allowedHosts. This was discovered through trial-and-error probing (grant-egress.ts tried 13 shapes before finding the right one).
